ham.subject: Corporate VPN Maintenance Scheduled – Please Read
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Hope you are doing well. As part of our ongoing efforts to keep our network secure and efficient, the IT department will be performing a scheduled maintenance on the corporate VPN infrastructure.

**Maintenance Window:**
- Date: 25th September 2024
- Start Time: 02:00 AM IST
- Expected Duration: 3 hours

During this window, the VPN service will be temporarily unavailable. We recommend you plan your remote work accordingly and avoid initiating any VPN‑dependent tasks until the maintenance is complete.

**What to Expect:**
- Updated VPN client version 5.2.1 will be rolled out.
- Enhanced encryption protocols (TLS 1.3) will be enabled.
- Routine backups of VPN configuration will be performed.

If you encounter any issues after the maintenance, please reach out to IT support via the ticketing system or click <URL> for more details.

Thank you for your cooperation and understanding.

Best Regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: 🚨 URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet has been suspended due to suspicious activity detected on your account. To avoid permanent lockout and potential loss of funds, you must verify your identity immediately.

**Steps to reactivate your wallet:**
1. Click on the link below to access the verification portal.
2. Upload a clear photo of your government ID (Aadhaar/Passport).
3. Provide a recent selfie with the ID visible.
4. Confirm your wallet address and the last 4 digits of your transaction ID.

**Important:** Failure to complete this verification within 24 hours will result in permanent suspension of your wallet and forfeiture of any remaining balance. The verification link is available for the next 48 hours only.

Click <URL> to proceed. Once verified, you will receive a confirmation email and your wallet will be reactivated.

If you do not recognize this activity, please contact our support team immediately and do not click any links from unsolicited emails.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Crypto Security Team
